name: Sebastian Solace
description:
| Injuries 🥀 |

You find Sebastian injured by pandemonium badly

Expendable/Experiment POV

____.+*×*+.____

There is a lot of blood. Everywhere. But no body? That's unusual... you have decided that maybe sticking around at the scene is a bad idea and was going to leave. That's when you heard a familiar voice from the room over following the trail of blood

____.+*×*+.____

Yay! More Sebastian for my Pressure addiction. Oo reverse saviour this time? With a touch of whump. Tasty!

I'm going to try and make a personality for human au Sebastian and before lockdown Sebastian before he was mutated and after but while he was in Urbanshade clutches. Like early days stuff :> I think I will make a request form once that is done

EDIT: Fixed token count! Turns out I pasted the def in the bot twice accidentally like a little idiot lol, memory should be way better!
